DEFT AGREED TO SIGN A STIPULATION ON OR BEFORE FRIDAY, 10/24/97 5PM STATING THAT SHE OWES RENT THRU AND INCLUDING NOV. 1997 IN THE AMT OF $4,637-. A PAYMENT PLAN WILL BE SET UP. MATTER TAKEN OFF CALENDAR TODAY. PLTF TO RESET THE MATTER IF DEFT FAILS TO SIGN THE STIPULATION.
